Remember the last time you bought something at a discount, only to see it later for the same price without the discount? Or when the product costs more today than it did yesterday. Did you feel cheated? Are you ready to look behind the screen of manipulation and lies? Spycost helps you see when you’re paying more while thinking you’re paying less. It gives you the full price picture, so you can decide whether it’s actually worth it.

Remember the last time you bought something at a discount, only to see it later for the same price without the discount? Or when the product costs more today than it did yesterday. Did you feel cheated? Are you ready to look behind the screen of manipulation and lies? Spycost helps you see when you’re paying more while thinking you’re paying less. It gives you the full price picture, so you can decide whether it’s actually worth it.

 Overview
 Reviews
 Alternatives

 Team
 Awards

Free Options

Launch tags:Productivity•Finance•Shopping [...] Hey Product Hunt 👋 I built Spycost because I couldn’t build a clear purchase priority list while being constantly hit with “attractive offers.” I kept breaking my own priorities because I was buying less important things just because I saw a “discount”. And later, I kept realizing that the discount I fell for was fake, or not nearly as good as it was presented. I constantly felt stupid, like I had been robbed by thieves I opened the door for and invited into my home myself. Spycost is a price tracker that shows you when you’re being fooled, or when the right moment to buy has finally come. At the end of the day, the final choice is still yours. If you don’t need to buy something right here and now, but you’re only planning to buy it, this is the perfect option for you. I built Spycost for [...] Report

Hlib Sukhovoi

Spycost

Spycost

Maker

@nadiia\_prokofieva thank you! Spycost isn’t limited to a fixed list of retailers. It’s designed to work with the vast majority of online stores, and so far it has worked well across different shops and regions.  
  
Right now the focus is reliable tracking for specific products, but I definitely want to expand this in the future so you can track not only one exact product, but a whole product class too, for example coffee machines with certain parameters across multiple brands and stores.

Report

Andras Czeizel

This is painfully relatable. a discount can make something feel urgent even when it was never a priority in the first place, and finding out later that the "sale" price was basically normal makes it even worse :)

results.title: ‎Spycost: Price Tracker App - App Store
results.content: again, add it once and let Spycost monitor it for you. Use Spycost to track wishlist items, gifts, electronics, clothes, home products, collectibles, and more. Free and paid plans are available depending on how many products you want to track. Terms of Use:  Privacy Policy: [...] Your personal price tracking assistant. Start tracking prices for free and let Spycost monitor product prices for you. Track products from online stores, follow price history, and get notified when prices change. Spycost helps you know when it’s the right time to buy. Spycost is a price tracking app for online shopping. Add a product link, save it to your watchlist, and let the app monitor price changes for you. No repeated store visits. No manual checking. No guessing whether today’s price is actually a good deal. HOW SPYCOST WORKS 1. Copy a product link Find a product in an online store and copy its URL. 2. Add it to Spycost Paste the link into the app. Spycost detects the product information and adds it to your list. 3. Follow price changes View the current price, previous price, [...] push or email alerts on or off for individual products. • Smart shopping watchlist Save products you plan to buy later and keep them organized in your tracked list. • Product archive Archive products you no longer actively track while keeping your list clean. • Product details Open tracked products, review price data, rename saved items, manage notifications, archive items, and return to the store page when needed. • Push and email notifications Choose how you want to receive price update alerts. • Multi-language support Use Spycost in English, Ukrainian, German, Spanish, and French. WHY USE SPYCOST? Spycost is built for people who shop online and want to buy at the right time. Instead of checking the same product again and again, add it once and let Spycost monitor it for you. results.title: SPYCOST - Price Tracker for Any Online Store
results.content:
SpycostSpycost

Price tracker for any online store

# Your personal price tracking assistantMonitoring prices so you don’t have to

SPYCOST automatically monitors prices across any online store, tracks price history, and sends price drop alerts the moment a better deal appears.

Any online store

add products with a single link

Instant price alerts

get notified when prices drop

Price history

see real price changes and trends

Smarter online shopping

buy at the right time

Spycost app screen

## Download SPYCOST

Start tracking prices from your iPhone. The iOS app is available now.

You can start with a free plan and upgrade when you need more tracking power.

Download on theApp Store

Google Play version is coming soon.

## Features [...] Google Play version is coming soon.

## Features

One app - save products, track prices smartly, and get alerts when it’s time to buy.

Add products with a single link

Paste a product link from any online store. The app automatically detects the product name and current price.

Automatic price monitoring 24/7

The system regularly checks prices for saved products and records all changes without user involvement.

Smart notifications

Receive notifications when the price goes down, goes up, or when a product becomes available again. Track any price change.

Any online store

Add products from marketplaces and niche stores. No restrictions on websites or product categories.

Price history and trends

View how prices have changed over time to see real trends and previous values. [...] Smart wishlist

Save products you plan to buy later. All saved items are automatically tracked.

## How it works

No extra steps or manual checks. Just add a product - we take care of the rest.

01

Copy the product link

Simply copy the product link from an online store.

02

Add the product to SPYCOST

Paste the link into the app. The product will appear in your list and start being tracked automatically.

03

Get notified about price changes

We’ll notify you when the price changes. No need to check the product manually.

## Pricing

Choose a plan based on how many products you want to track. All plans include automatic price monitoring - only limits and advanced features differ.

Loading available plans...

## FAQ

Answers to common questions about price tracking and notifications.

results.content:
The line graph and table below show historical information about the fund’s premium and discount over certain periods. The vertical axis of the line graph shows the premium/discount expressed as a percentage of NAV. The horizontal axis indicates the date at which the premium/discount occurred. The table shows the number of trading days in which the fund traded at a premium or at a discount to NAV.

### Number of Days Summary

Number of days the ETF 4PM Bid/Ask was above the NAV. The vertical axis of the line graph shows the premium/discount expressed as a percentage of NAV. The horizontal axis indicates the date at which the premium/discount occurred. The table shows the number of trading days in which the fund traded at a premium or at a discount to NAV. [...] Equity securities may fluctuate in value and can decline significantly in response to the activities of individual companies and general market and economic conditions.

Passively managed funds invest by sampling the index, holding a range of securities that, in the aggregate, approximates the full Index in terms of key risk factors and other characteristics. This may cause the fund to experience tracking errors relative to performance of the index.

While the shares of ETFs are tradable on secondary markets, they may not readily trade in all market conditions and may trade at significant discounts in periods of market stress.
